_comment: HOW TO ADD A NEW PRODUCT:
_comment2: 1. Copy any product object below and paste it at the end of the array (before the closing ])
_comment3: 2. Give it a unique 'id' (lowercase, hyphens only, e.g. 'my-new-hoodie')
_comment4: 3. Add your product image(s) to the /images folder
_comment5: 4. Set 'imageFront' and optionally 'imageBack' to the filename inside /images/
_comment6: 5. Set 'category' to one of: tees | hoodies | sets | new
_comment7: 6. Set 'badge' to a short label like '⚡ New' or 'Fan Fave', or leave as empty string ''
_comment8: 7. Set 'salePrice' to null if there is no sale, or a number like 110 for a sale price
_comment9: 8. 'description' shows on the product detail page
_comment10: 9. 'sizes' lists available sizes shown as buttons
_comment11: DONE! The product will automatically appear on the homepage grid and get its own detail page.

name: Stay On Your Deen Tee
description: A reminder to stay focused on what matters. Clean script on a heavyweight tee. Wear your deen on your chest.

name: Worry About Yourself Tee
description: Mind your own business — literally. The flip side of the Deen tee. Bold, unapologetic, 100% jabi energy.

name: Patience Hoodie — Hot Pink
description: Hot pink. PATIENCE down the sleeve. Sabr calligraphy on the front. For the bold and the blessed.

name: Patience Zip Hoodie — Teal
description: Black zip hoodie with teal Sabr calligraphy on front and PATIENCE running down the sleeve. Unisex fit.

name: Sabr Hoodie — Black/Red
description: The OG. Black hoodie with red Sabr script. Spotted at Voice of Chester. This one started it all.

name: Sabr Sweatsuit — Cream/Red
description: Cream sweatsuit with red Sabr script. Hoodie + matching jogger pants. The full fit, waterfront ready.

name: Hijabi Baddie Graphic Hoodie
description: The Hijabi Baddie signature hoodie. B&W photo print with Parental Advisory energy. This is the statement piece.
